paths.node:fs: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use Tauri commands (invoke) for filesystem access. See packages/prompt-master/src/index.ts for the client-safe pattern.
paths.node:fs/promises: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use Tauri commands (invoke) for filesystem access.
paths.node:path: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use the @tauri-apps/api/path APIs.
paths.node:os: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use the @tauri-apps/api/os APIs.
paths.node:crypto: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use globalThis.crypto.subtle (Web Crypto).
paths.node:child_process: Tauri WebView can't spawn processes — use Tauri commands (invoke) on the Rust side.
paths.node:stream: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use Web Streams (ReadableStream/WritableStream).
paths.node:util: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules.
paths.node:events: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use EventTarget or a small lib.
paths.node:buffer: Tauri WebView can't run Node modules — use Uint8Array / TextEncoder / TextDecoder.
paths.@founder-os/prompt-master/node: The /node entry point pulls in node:fs and node:child_process. The desktop app uses the client-safe barrel: import from "@founder-os/prompt-master" only.
